message:
test(fuzz): RevocationRegistry add + update_head + freshness (3e6up)

Add fuzz_revocation_registry covering RevocationRegistry::{add_revocation,
update_head, is_revoked, is_revoked_at, is_fresh, check_freshness} and
RevocationObject::is_active (revocation.rs:128-660). add_revocation
implements the C1 fix preventing past-expiry suppression — incoming
revocation only replaces existing iff strictly dominates in
(effective_at↓, expires_at↑) poset (None==+∞). Cross-checks against an
in-target reference dominance computation. Properties: is_active time
gate, revokes membership, registry HashMap agreement, dominance
correctness (defer attack and past-expiry suppression both rejected),
update_head monotonic seq guard, is_fresh equivalence, check_freshness
matrix across Strict/Warn/BestEffort with the corresponding
FreshnessFailureReason. Once-gated anchors verify each C1 attack
defense and freshness-policy branch on hand-picked inputs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
